name: install_encrypted_package
short_description: Install an IP package previously protected by the encrypt_package command.
full_help:
install_encrypted_package

Description: 
Install an IP package previously protected by the encrypt_package command.

Syntax: 
install_encrypted_package  [-repo <arg>] [-force] [-quiet] [-verbose]
                           <archive>...

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-repo]     A directory containing an IP repo where the IP should be 
              installed to.
              Default: cwd
  [-force]    Force the overwrite of an existing output files.
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <archive>   Name of file containing the protected IP archive.

Categories: 
FileIO
